description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style shotgun with a compact, angular design and a matte black finish. The body features a robust receiver with a prominent cylindrical drum magazine, suggesting a high-capacity, repeating action. The fore-end is equipped with a ventilated handguard, likely for heat dissipation and improved grip, and the top rail appears to allow for mounting optics or accessories. The grip is ergonomic with finger grooves, and the stock is integrated into the body with a thumbhole design for stability and control. The muzzle is squared off, and the overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components for weight reduction. The shotgun's design is utilitarian and suited for urban tactical scenarios, emphasizing durability and ease of handling.
description: A compact, tactical black shotgun with a drum magazine, ventilated handguard, and ergonomic grip, designed for urban use. Its angular, modern build features a thumbhole stock and accessory rail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared muzzle, front sight, and the width of the handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the drum magazine, thumbhole stock, and ventilated handguard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, grip, and the alignment of the receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the drum magazine, thumbhole stock, and accessory rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short tactical barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with integrated finger grooves and reinforced edges
